name: python3-filteralchemy
title: python3-filteralchemy
description:
Declarative query builder for SQLAlchemy (Python 3)
This package contains a declarative query builder for SQLAlchemy. It uses
marshmallow-sqlalchemy to auto-generate filter fields and webargs to parse
field parameters from the request. Use it to filter data with minimal
boilerplate.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-filteralchemy because Declarative query builder for SQLAlchemy (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-filteralchemy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-filteralchemy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-filteralchemy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
